items.title: Spain finally announce World Cup arrival as Yamal, Oyarzabal star in Saudi win
items.summary: Lamine Yamal and Mikel Oyarzabal were the stars of the show as Spain finally announced their arrival at the 2026 World Cup with a 4-0 thrashing of Saudi Arabia.

items.title: Women's World Matchplay field confirmed with Greaves, Ashton, Sherrock in contention
items.summary: The field and draw for the Women's World Matchplay have been confirmed with Lisa Ashton set to defend her title.

items.title: Awkward moment World Cup winning official FALLS ASLEEP behind Fifa chief Gianni Infantino at Spain vs Saudi Arabia
items.summary: A FIFA World Cup winner was picked up live on TV falling ASLEEP during Spain's clash with Saudi Arabia. items.title: This is not a drill! Serena to play Wimbledon singles
items.summary: Serena Williams has been handed the final Wimbledon singles wild card into the women's main draw as she prepares for her Grand Slam comeback.

items.title: Woad suffers play-off heartbreak as Yamashita snatches LPGA Tour win
items.summary: England's Lottie Woad narrowly missed out on her second LPGA Tour victory of the season after Miyu Yamashita snatched a dramatic play-off victory at the Meijer LPGA Classic.

items.title: Yamal inspires sharper Spain to statement World Cup win
items.summary: It may have taken them a week but Spain have arrived at the World Cup - and their rivals for the trophy will be wary.

items.title: Bergvall asks to leave Tottenham
items.summary: Sweden midfielder Lucas Bergvall has asked to leave Tottenham Hotspur this summer.

items.title: Notts knock Essex off County Championship top spot
items.summary: Defending champions Nottinghamshire replaced opponents Essex at the top of Rothesay County Championship Division One after winning by an innings and 52 runs at Chelmsford.

items.summary: THOMAS TUCHEL repeatedly shouted "wake up" at Djed Spence during an England training session. The Three Lions have been busy at their Kansas City HQ preparing for Tuesday's clash with Ghana. During Saturday's session, boss Tuchel could be seen showing frustration with Tottenham star Spence. items.title: Sources: Newcastle reject Spurs' $100M Tonali bid
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur have had an offer worth in the region of £75 million ($100m) rejected by Newcastle United for Sandro Tonali, sources have confirmed to ESPN.

items.title: Lamine Yamal on target as Spain put four past Saudi Arabia
items.summary: Lamine Yamal scored 10 minutes into his first World Cup start as Spain beat Saudi Arabia to register their first win of the tournament.

items.title: Incredible tale of lads who fled Britain for ’86 Mexico World Cup & never came back… as they reunite to cheer on England
items.summary: IT’S the kind of scheme you dream up with your mates in the pub after a few too many beers. “We’ve all lost our jobs . . . rather than looking for new ones, why don’t we fly to the other side of the world and watch the World Cup?” Nonsense, right? Especially if you have got kids...

items.title: Japan set sights on WCup glory after record win
items.summary: After a record-breaking evening for Japan, Daichi Kamada reiterated their target of winning the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

items.title: How Alex Freeman's Pro Bowl dad helped him live hi...
items.summary: Antonio Freeman taught son Alex what it takes to be a pro. It was his mom and his stepdad, though, who taught the USMNT defender to love soccer.

items.title: Conceição: No obligation to pass ball to Ronaldo
items.summary: Portugal's Francisco Conceição on Sunday rejected suggestions that the team feels compelled to constantly look for Cristiano Ronaldo on the pitch at this 2026 FIFA World Cup.

items.title: Curaçao GK ties Howard's WC save record in draw
items.summary: Curaçao goalkeeper Eloy Room made 15 saves to equal the World Cup record and help earn the island nation its first-ever World Cup point with a 0-0 draw against heavily favored Ecuador on Saturday.

items.title: Messi, Haaland, Mbappé, Kane: Who will be the Worl...
items.summary: We're more than a week into the 2026 World Cup, and the race for the Golden Boot -- given to the tournament's top goal scorer -- is heating up.

items.title: Saliba playing through pain for France WCup bid
items.summary: William Saliba has said he has been playing through pain for several months but the Arsenal defender has been inspired to keep pushing by the opportunity to make history.

items.title: Yamal nets 1st World Cup goal to fuel Spain rout
items.summary: Lamine Yamal needed just 10 minutes of his first start at a World Cup to get his first goal on soccer's biggest stage.

items.title: Garcia out as Ajax coach after turbulent season
items.summary: Ajax parted ways with coach Oscar Garcia on Sunday after a turbulent season in which the Dutch club finished fifth in Eredivisie.

items.title: Netherlands break WC record with Sweden thumping
items.summary: Netherlands coach Ronald Koeman said their 5-1 win over Sweden on Saturday sends a warning message to their World Cup rivals. The dominant victory came on the same day his side broke a tournament record.
